title: galium bungei var. hispidum
intro: Galium bungei var. hispidum, also known as Hispid Woodruff, is a variety of the Galium bungei plant, a type of flowering plant in the bedstraw family. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Hispid Woodruff include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Hispid Woodruff is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its numerous health benefits.
